response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in building scalable systems and has worked with various technologies. However, there is limited direct experience in AI-first growth and experimentation systems.
strengths: Proven experience in building scalable systems
Strong technical background with multiple programming languages
Experience with cloud and distributed systems
concerns: Limited direct experience in AI-first growth and experimentation systems
No clear experience with experimentation platforms and feature-flagging systems
Not explicitly mentioned experience with telemetry and metrics infrastructure

key_factors.factor: Limited direct experience in AI-first growth systems
